objects.description: [SPAWNCHIMERA](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9024) has searched for running processes to include web or dsmdm.(Citation: CISA SPAWNCHIMERA RESURGE February 2026)(Citation: Google UNC5221 BRICKSTORM SPAWNCHIMERA April 2024)
